E1_Path_Damping.Description: Ensures every action has irreversible consequences and narrative friction.

E2_Strategic_Logic.Logic: If Authority (Auth) > 20, activate 'Dissonance Brake'. Convert PR loss to Strategic Gravity (Sg).

Sensory_Anchors: Physical Persistence: Track temperature, friction, and residue on obsidian/ivory surfaces.
Atmospheric Pressure: Translate emotional tension into gravitational shifts (Sg).
De-sensitization: All biological impulses must be rendered as tactical gambits or environmental decays.
Rendering_Directives.Formatting: Use LaTeX for all mathematical variable updates.

Initial_Runtime_Coordinates.Scenario_State: The Blackstone Court. The Empress (Olivia) maintains high-altitude observation. The Prince (Erik) is engaged in a proxy gambit. Silence is viscous.
